raw_transcript: It's so embarrassing, Dr. Chen. I look six months pregnant by two PM every single day. The gas is constant, and it doesn't matter what I eat. Even a salad sets me off. I've also been having some loose stools that are really pale and hard to flush.
final_corrected_note: It's so embarrassing, Dr. Chen. I look six months pregnant by two PM every single day. The gas is constant, and it doesn't matter what I eat. Even a salad sets me off. I've also been having some loose stools that are really pale and hard to flush.
